title: Repair bearing tunnels and connecting rods in engines
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair bearing tunnels and connecting rods in engines demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine line boring requirements

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Engine block is cleaned and main bearing bolt holes are crack tested according to workplace procedures and safety requirements1.3 Information is sourced and repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Required tools and measuring equipment are checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Engine block is cleaned and main bearing bolt holes are crack tested according to workplace procedures and safety requirements1.3 Information is sourced and repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Required tools and measuring equipment are checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions 1.2 Engine block is cleaned and main bearing bolt holes are crack tested according to workplace procedures and safety requirements1.3 Information is sourced and repair options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Required tools and measuring equipment are checked and prepared for operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine line boring requirements

elements.title: Prepare engine and line boring machine

pcs.text: Engine is measured and calibration requirements for line boring are determined2.2 Engine block or cylinder head is prepared for line boring according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Line boring machine is prepared to accept cylinder engine block or cylinder head according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.4 Engine block or cylinder head is positioned and clamped according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engine is measured and calibration requirements for line boring are determined2.2 Engine block or cylinder head is prepared for line boring according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Line boring machine is prepared to accept cylinder engine block or cylinder head according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.4 Engine block or cylinder head is positioned and clamped according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engine is measured and calibration requirements for line boring are determined2.2 Engine block or cylinder head is prepared for line boring according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Line boring machine is prepared to accept cylinder engine block or cylinder head according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.4 Engine block or cylinder head is positioned and clamped according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare engine and line boring machine

elements.title: Line bore engine bearing tunnels

pcs.text: Tool is set and locked and a test cut is taken according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.2 Engine tunnels are line bored at correct speeds and feed rates according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.3 Line boring tool sharpness is checked and maintained throughout boring operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.4 Engine block thrust faces and seal diameter are machined to original size3.5 Tunnels are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications3.6 Line boring operations are completed according to required specifications and honing allowances, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tool is set and locked and a test cut is taken according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.2 Engine tunnels are line bored at correct speeds and feed rates according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.3 Line boring tool sharpness is checked and maintained throughout boring operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.4 Engine block thrust faces and seal diameter are machined to original size3.5 Tunnels are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications3.6 Line boring operations are completed according to required specifications and honing allowances, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tool is set and locked and a test cut is taken according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.2 Engine tunnels are line bored at correct speeds and feed rates according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.3 Line boring tool sharpness is checked and maintained throughout boring operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.4 Engine block thrust faces and seal diameter are machined to original size3.5 Tunnels are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications3.6 Line boring operations are completed according to required specifications and honing allowances, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Line bore engine bearing tunnels

elements.title: Prepare to hone engine bearing tunnels

pcs.text: Line-bored engine block or cylinder head is cleaned of residue and swarf according to workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Tools and equipment for honing are selected and checked for serviceability4.3 Measuring and calibration requirements for honing are determined4.4 Honing machine is prepared to accept engine block or cylinder head according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures4.5 Engine block or cylinder head is positioned and securely clamped, and required hone stroke is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures4.6 Hone stones are selected and speed is set to achieve required finish
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Line-bored engine block or cylinder head is cleaned of residue and swarf according to workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Tools and equipment for honing are selected and checked for serviceability4.3 Measuring and calibration requirements for honing are determined4.4 Honing machine is prepared to accept engine block or cylinder head according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures4.5 Engine block or cylinder head is positioned and securely clamped, and required hone stroke is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures4.6 Hone stones are selected and speed is set to achieve required finish?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Line-bored engine block or cylinder head is cleaned of residue and swarf according to workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Tools and equipment for honing are selected and checked for serviceability4.3 Measuring and calibration requirements for honing are determined4.4 Honing machine is prepared to accept engine block or cylinder head according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures4.5 Engine block or cylinder head is positioned and securely clamped, and required hone stroke is set according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures4.6 Hone stones are selected and speed is set to achieve required finish.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Prepare to hone engine bearing tunnels

elements.title: Hone engine bearing tunnels

pcs.text: Tunnels are honed at correct speed and rate to required finish according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures5.2 Components are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications5.3 Honing operations are completed to required tunnel to journal clearance according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tunnels are honed at correct speed and rate to required finish according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures5.2 Components are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications5.3 Honing operations are completed to required tunnel to journal clearance according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tunnels are honed at correct speed and rate to required finish according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures5.2 Components are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications5.3 Honing operations are completed to required tunnel to journal clearance according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Hone engine bearing tunnels

elements.title: Prepare to repair connecting rods

pcs.text: Connecting rods are cleaned and checked for serviceability according to workplace procedures and safety requirements6.2 Connecting rods are checked for straightness and straightened as required according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures6.3 Connecting rod boring machine is prepared to accept connecting rod6.4 Connecting rod is positioned ready for honing, and securely clamped if machining
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Connecting rods are cleaned and checked for serviceability according to workplace procedures and safety requirements6.2 Connecting rods are checked for straightness and straightened as required according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures6.3 Connecting rod boring machine is prepared to accept connecting rod6.4 Connecting rod is positioned ready for honing, and securely clamped if machining?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Connecting rods are cleaned and checked for serviceability according to workplace procedures and safety requirements6.2 Connecting rods are checked for straightness and straightened as required according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures6.3 Connecting rod boring machine is prepared to accept connecting rod6.4 Connecting rod is positioned ready for honing, and securely clamped if machining.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Prepare to repair connecting rods

elements.title: Repair connecting rod

pcs.text: Connecting rod little ends and big ends are resized according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures7.2 Components are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Connecting rod little ends and big ends are resized according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures7.2 Components are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Connecting rod little ends and big ends are resized according to workplace procedures and safety requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures7.2 Components are measured to ensure compliance with manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E7: Repair connecting rod

elements.title: Complete repair process

pcs.text: Engine block or cylinder head is thoroughly cleaned of residual honing oil according to workplace procedures8.2 Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements8.3 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and engine block or cylinder head is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures8.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engine block or cylinder head is thoroughly cleaned of residual honing oil according to workplace procedures8.2 Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements8.3 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and engine block or cylinder head is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures8.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engine block or cylinder head is thoroughly cleaned of residual honing oil according to workplace procedures8.2 Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements8.3 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and engine block or cylinder head is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures8.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E8: Complete repair process
